visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens in a bright indoor studio where a middle-aged man with glasses, a grey newsboy cap, and a blue t-shirt with a white dog logo is seated behind a white desk. He holds a small black DJI Mic transmitter in his right hand, displaying it to the camera against a plain white background. (2) A close-up shot transitions to an open grey hardshell carrying case for the DJI Mic 3 system. Inside, the receiver with an OLED screen is nestled between two square transmitters, with two grey furry windshields and a USB-C cable visible. A grey fabric storage pouch sits beneath the case on a white surface. (3) A black digital scale is shown in a top-down view. A hand places a single black transmitter on the center of the scale, and the red LED display shows the weight as 16.4 grams. (4) The camera focuses closely on the man's hands as he demonstrates a magnetic back clip on the transmitter. He pulls a circular magnetic disc away from the black plastic body of the mic and snaps it back on, showing the red record button on the side. (5) Multiple close-up screen captures of the receiver's touchscreen interface are shown. A finger scrolls through settings like 'Auto Gain Control', 'Tone Presets (Bright, Regular, Rich)', and 'Track Modes (M, S, Q)'. (6) The transmitter is held next to a DJI Osmo Pocket 3 gimbal camera. The camera's screen displays a successful connection message with a green checkmark indicating 'Connected DJI Osmo Audio'. (7) The scene shifts outdoors to a city sidewalk with tall modern buildings and green trees in the background. The man is standing and gesturing enthusiastically as he speaks. The lighting is bright natural daylight with soft shadows on the ground. (8) A wide, long-distance shot of the urban pedestrian walkway is shown. A red arrow overlay points to the man standing far in the distance to demonstrate the wireless transmission range of the microphone while traffic and other pedestrians are faintly visible.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Subtitle]: DJI Mic 2. (2) [Subtitle]: DJI Mic mini. (3) [Variety]: 兩個結合. [Variety]: 就是我們的Mic 3. (4) [Subtitle]: 打開了. [Subtitle]: 線材 防風罩. [Variety]: 磁吸的也有. (5) [Subtitle]: 重點是你看 小巧一個. (6) [Variety]: 因為它 重量只有16克. [Subtitle]: 出門拍攝啊 很省空間. (7) [Variety]: 加上什麼 你知道嗎 側夾 倒夾. [Subtitle]: 全部可以對準音源. (8) [Subtitle]: 自動增益調節 還有三檔音色. [Variety]: 全新功能. (9) [Variety]: 首創 4發8收. [Subtitle]: 最多四個人可以同時錄音. (10) [Subtitle]: 讓音訊跟影像一鍵同步 跨設備剪輯. (11) [Subtitle]: 支援osmo360 Action5 Pro osmo Pocket 3. (12) [Subtitle]: 好 我現在就是用 osmo pocket3. (13) [Subtitle]: 其實是可以 到400米的.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, at least 2 female passers-by in the outdoor background
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing a blue t-shirt with a 'ROOTS TAIWAN' dog logo, a grey newsboy cap, silver-rimmed glasses, and a yellow smartwatch.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video transitions between a clean, white-walled indoor studio with a white desk and a busy urban street featuring modern glass-fronted buildings, a tree-lined sidewalk, and a distant road with scooters.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with an energetic male voice introducing the DJI Mic 2 and mini in Traditional Chinese. The tone is high-arousal and fast-paced, accompanied by a driving electronic BGM with a steady 124 BPM pulse. (2) A sharp mechanical click triggers a new phase as the speaker describes opening the case. The interplay of high-frequency BGM synth leads and the crisp, close-miked vocal creates a bright spectral balance. (3) A subtle percussive thud is heard as the transmitter is placed on a scale. The narration remains continuous and enthusiastic, detailing the weight of the device. (4) Distinct plastic-on-plastic clicking and snapping sounds occur as the magnetic clip is demonstrated. The vocal delivery is enunciated with high dominance and positive valence. (5) The speaker lists technical features quickly, with short 'whoosh' transition SFX separating different screen demonstrations. The BGM ducks slightly to maintain vocal clarity. (6) A soft digital chime or 'ding' sounds as the speaker mentions connection to Osmo cameras. The acoustic texture is studio-clean with no ambient noise. (7) A noticeable shift in ambient noise occurs as the scene moves outdoors; the low-frequency hum of urban traffic and a broadband wind bed become audible beneath the voice. The vocal maintains high intensity to cut through the environment. (8) The narrator's voice sounds slightly thinner with more natural reverb as he tests the range from a distance, while the city noise floor remains consistent at a moderate volume intensity.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Feature Breakdown -> Demonstration -> Field Test -> Recommendation.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This video serves as a high-energy product review and promotion for the DJI Mic 3. It leverages quick cuts, on-screen text emphasis, and a field test to highlight the microphone's compact size, technical versatility (4-channel recording), and impressive long-distance wireless range to potential tech enthusiasts and creators.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product showcase, technical specification breakdown, and direct range testing of a specific brand's new hardware.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A fast-paced, professionally edited tech review that effectively uses both indoor controlled environments and outdoor stress tests to demonstrate product utility.
